name: EarnForex/Three-Line-Break - GitHub
snippet: Three-Line Break is a custom MT4/MT5 indicator coded by EarnForex.com. You can use it to display a line break chart in your MetaTrader platform. Missing: JavaScript implementation

name: Three Line Break Charts - ChartSchool - StockCharts.com
snippet: Three Line Break charts show a series of vertical white and black lines; the white lines represent rising prices, while the black lines portray falling prices.
